2026-05-04.content:
When running a Confidential Space workload with an NVIDIA H100 GPU attached, you
might see the following error message:

```
failed to get launchspec, make sure you're running inside
a GCE VM: GPU Driver installation is not supported.
```

This is a known issue with the Confidential Space image. To work around the
issue, restart the Confidential VM.

summary.title: GPU Driver Issue in Confidential Space
summary.summary: Users running Confidential Space workloads with NVIDIA H100 GPUs may encounter a 'GPU Driver installation is not supported' error. This is a known issue with the Confidential VM image. Restarting the Confidential VM can serve as a workaround.

A Confidential Space image (260400) is available. Support for Confidential
Space on H100 GPU (a3-highgpu-1g machine family) is
[generally available](https://cloud.google.com/products#product-launch-stages).
